targets.query:
from(bucket: "signalk")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regatta.helmsman" and r._field == "name")
  |> group(columns: ["_value"])
  |> count()

from(bucket: "signalk")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regatta.events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "note")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "type"])

from(bucket: "signalk")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regatta.sails" and r._field == "sail")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "type"])

from(bucket: "signalk")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regatta.start_line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lat" or r._field == "lon")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")

from(bucket: "signalk")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "regatta.events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.type == "tack" or r.type == "gybe")
